senses.definition: meat that is from a cow

examples.x: The roast beef sandwich at the deli is a customer favorite, piled high with thinly sliced beef and horseradish sauce.
The recipe called for braising beef short ribs in red wine until they were fall-off-the-bone tender.
She ordered a rare steak, preferring her beef to be cooked just enough to seal in the juices.

senses.definition: meat from a pig, eaten as food

examples.x: He enjoyed a hearty breakfast of bacon, eggs, and sausage made from pork.
The barbecue restaurant specializes in slow-smoked pork ribs with a tangy barbecue sauce.
The recipe called for marinating the pork chops in a mixture of soy sauce, garlic, and ginger before grilling.

senses.definition: meat of chickens, turkeys, and ducks

examples.x: I bought a whole chicken from the grocery store to make a delicious poultry dish for dinner.
Poultry is a lean source of protein and a healthier alternative to red meat.
She prepared a mouthwatering chicken curry using a blend of spices and tender pieces of poultry.

senses.definition: meat of a young cow

examples.x: They enjoyed a refreshing summer salad with grilled veal, mixed greens and seasonal fruits.
She purchased ground veal to make homemade meatballs for spaghetti night.
She grilled veal for dinner, marinating it in a savory herb mixture for added flavor.

senses.definition: the small intestines of a pig, typically cleaned and cooked as a delicacy in various culinary traditions

examples.x: Despite their popularity, she found the smell of chitterlings quite unpleasant and preferred other dishes.
She cooked the chitterlings with spices and served them as a traditional dish.

senses.definition: the edible lining of the stomach of various animals, typically used in cooking

examples.x: She decided to try a new recipe and cooked tripe with spices and herbs.
We visited a local restaurant famous for its tripe-based dishes and savored the flavors of their tripe soup.

senses.definition: beef that has been cured in a brine solution, typically seasoned with spices and salt

examples.x: She prepared a delicious corned beef sandwich for her lunch.
They cooked corned beef and cabbage for their St. Patrick's Day celebration.

senses.definition: canned or preserved meat, typically beef, often used in military rations

examples.x: He opened a can of bully beef to make a quick sandwich for his lunch.
I used slices of bully beef as a topping for my homemade pizza.

senses.definition: a type of meat that has been minced or finely chopped

examples.x: He cooked a delicious spaghetti bolognese with ground beef for dinner.
I like to make tacos with seasoned ground beef, topped with cheese and salsa.

senses.definition: a type of meat cut from a pig's thigh, usually smoked or salted

examples.x: He diced the leftover ham and used it to make a flavorful fried rice.
She sliced the ham into thin strips and added it to her pasta dish.
She prepared a glazed ham for the holiday feast, baking it with a sweet and savory glaze until golden brown.
He enjoys sandwiches made with thinly sliced ham and Swiss cheese, stacked between slices of fresh bread.
The butcher sells a variety of hams, including smoked, honey-glazed, and spiral-cut options.

senses.definition: the flesh of a chicken that we use as food

examples.x: I made a comforting chicken noodle soup to warm up on a cold day.
She prepared a flavorful chicken curry with aromatic spices and coconut milk.
The restaurant served juicy grilled chicken burgers with all the toppings.

senses.definition: meat of a duck, eaten as food

examples.x: They marinated the duck in an Asian-inspired sauce and grilled it to perfection.
She roasted a whole duck for the family dinner, seasoned with herbs and spices for added flavor.
He's allergic to poultry, so he avoids dishes containing duck to prevent allergic reactions.
The roasted duck was served with a side of wild rice pilaf, creating a satisfying and elegant meal.
She prepared a rustic duck stew, simmering duck legs with onions, carrots, and potatoes in a rich broth.

senses.definition: meat of a goose, eaten as food

examples.x: He roasted a plump goose for his family's Thanksgiving dinner.
She slow-cooked a goose in a savory broth with herbs and root vegetables.
For Christmas dinner, they roasted a succulent goose and served it with cranberry sauce and roasted vegetables.
The restaurant's specialty was crispy-skinned goose, served with a tangy orange glaze and crispy roast potatoes.

senses.definition: meat of a turkey, eaten as food, especially during holidays like Thanksgiving and Christmas

examples.x: He smoked a whole turkey and served it with a tangy barbecue sauce.
Thanksgiving is never complete without the aroma of a succulent turkey.
They grilled turkey burgers and served them with a side of sweet potato fries.

senses.definition: the meat of young domestic pigeons that are slaughtered before they are able to fly

examples.x: He prepared a mouthwatering squab dish for dinner, savoring every bite of the tender meat.
The famous food blogger shared a tantalizing recipe featuring marinated squab.

senses.definition: the flesh of the small game bird, known for its lean and flavorful meat

examples.x: He prepared a delightful appetizer of grilled quail, impressing his dinner guests with his culinary skills.
The family gathered around the dining table, savoring the succulent quail, which had been marinated and grilled to perfection.

senses.definition: meat of a grouse, eaten as food

examples.x: She decided to prepare a delicious roasted grouse for her dinner party.
The restaurant featured a special dish of grilled grouse with a side of wild mushrooms.

senses.definition: meat of a pheasant, eaten as food

examples.x: The hunters returned with a bag full of plump pheasants after a successful hunt.

senses.definition: the liver of an animal that can be cooked and eaten
the meat such as beef and lamb that turn brown when cooked

examples.x: He grilled a juicy steak, savoring the flavor of the perfectly cooked red meat.
I opted for a lean cut of red meat, such as sirloin, to create a delicious and healthy stir-fry.
He enjoys his burgers made with ground red meat, seasoned with herbs and spices for flavor.
The butcher offers a variety of cuts of red meat, including ribeye, tenderloin, and brisket.
She grilled skewers of marinated red meat for a barbecue party with friends.

senses.definition: the meat such as chicken, rabbit, etc., that is pale in color

examples.x: She cooked a flavorful and aromatic curry, using diced white meat as the main ingredient.
She prepared a healthy and satisfying turkey sandwich, using slices of lean white meat as the filling.
She prefers to eat white meat over red meat for its lower fat content and milder flavor.
He cooked a pot of creamy soup using chunks of white meat, carrots, and celery.

senses.definition: ‌a mixture of meat, bread, etc. cut into small pieces and put into a long tube of skin, typically sold raw to be cooked before eating

examples.x: He enjoys a sausage sandwich for his lunch.
He packed a mouthwatering sausage sandwich for his lunch, layered with fresh veggies and a tangy mustard sauce.
I love the taste of smoked sausage in a stew.
She made a sausage and bean soup on a cold day.
They gathered around the barbecue, grilling a variety of sausages for a fun and flavorful backyard cookout.

senses.definition: related to a preservation method where food is treated or preserved with salt

examples.x: She learned how to make salt-cured vegetables to preserve them for the winter.
We enjoyed a platter of salt-cured meats and cheeses at the picnic.

senses.definition: cooked meat that is sliced before sale and eaten cold

examples.x: He made a delicious sandwich with sliced lunch meat for his picnic lunch.
She used the leftover lunch meat to make a flavorful pasta salad for dinner.

senses.definition: meat of African wild animals eaten as food

examples.x: They were fascinated by the rich flavors of a traditional bushmeat stew they tasted while traveling abroad.

senses.definition: animal brains that are used as edible meat

examples.x: He decided to try a new culinary experience and ordered a dish made with fried pig brain.
She joined a cooking class that specialized in preparing dishes using various types of animal brains.

senses.definition: the edible muscle in the mouth of animals, typically known for its unique texture and flavor

examples.x: She found the idea of eating tongue quite unpleasant and decided to stick to her usual choices.
The restaurant served a tongue sandwich on freshly baked bread, creating a satisfying and unique lunch option.

senses.definition: an organ in an animal's body that takes waste matter from its blood by sending it out of their body and can often be cooked and eaten

examples.x: As adventurous eaters, they tried a variety of exotic foods but drew the line at kidneys.
He had a deep-seated hate for kidney, finding it unappetizing and refusing to even consider trying it.

senses.definition: a type of meat that refers to the thymus or pancreas of a young animal

examples.x: She cooked the sweetbread in a creamy mushroom sauce, and it turned out to be her favorite dish.
The chef recommended the sweetbread as a unique and flavorful addition to the dinner menu.

senses.definition: (of food) prepared according to Islamic law
(of food) prepared according to Jewish law

examples.x: The family hosted a kosher Passover Seder, with all the food prepared according to tradition.
He bought kosher wine for the Sabbath celebration.
They observed kosher guidelines during the holiday by avoiding mixing dairy and meat products in their meals.

senses.definition: meat of the legs of a bird that has turned dark after being cooked, eaten as food

examples.x: He prefers dark meat over white meat because he finds it juicier and more flavorful.
We ordered a bucket of fried chicken with a mix of both white and dark meat pieces.

senses.definition: flesh from a fish that we use as food

examples.x: He used white fish to make fish and vegetable stir-fry for a healthy dinner.
She cooked a mouthwatering fish curry, spiced with fragrant herbs and served over steamed rice.
She grilled the fish to perfection, sprinkling it with herbs and lemon for a fresh and zesty flavor.
The fish tacos were topped with tangy slaw and creamy sauce.

senses.definition: meat of an adult sheep

examples.x: I cooked a comforting pot of mutton soup, with tender chunks of meat and vegetables.

senses.definition: meat of a deer, eaten as food

examples.x: They ordered a mouthwatering venison burger from a trendy restaurant.
We gathered around the campfire, roasting skewers of marinated venison over the crackling flames.

senses.definition: young goat meat known for its tender texture, delicate flavor, and lean profile, used in various cuisines worldwide
meat that is from a young sheep

examples.x: The Easter celebration includes a traditional dish of roasted lamb, symbolizing rebirth and renewal.
The Middle Eastern dish, shawarma, features thinly sliced lamb cooked on a vertical rotisserie.
The shepherd's pie is made with minced lamb, topped with creamy mashed potatoes.

senses.definition: meat from a rabbit, eaten as food

examples.x: She carefully prepared a flavorful rabbit stew, using fresh herbs and vegetables to enhance its natural taste.
They decided to try something new for dinner and opted for a roasted rabbit
The chef prepared a traditional French dish of rabbit in mustard sauce, served with crusty bread.
The chef prepared a gourmet tasting menu featuring rabbit as the main course, paired with seasonal vegetables and sauces.

senses.definition: a tough part of meat that is hard to eat

examples.x: With a sharp knife, the chef expertly removed the gristle from the pork chops.

senses.definition: the culinary term for squid, commonly prepared and served as a dish

examples.x: She ordered a plate of calamari and savored every bite.

senses.definition: a type of fish known for its firm texture and mild flavor
meat that is finely chopped or ground, typically beef

examples.x: For a quick and easy dinner, she cooked the mince with tomato sauce and served it over rice.
I added some diced vegetables to the mince to make a delicious meat sauce for pasta.

senses.definition: the meat of a lobster as food

examples.x: She ordered a whole lobster and cracked it open to reveal the tender meat inside.
He enjoyed a lobster roll by the seaside.
The lobster was boiled and served with melted butter for dipping.

senses.definition: any meat that is cut into small pieces, pressed into a container such as cans and then served cold

examples.x: He prepared a simple sandwich with sliced luncheon meat, lettuce, and mayo for his quick lunch.
The children's lunchboxes were filled with wholesome snacks, including luncheon meat roll-ups and fruit slices.

senses.definition: the eggs of a female fish or the sperm of a male fish, eaten as food

examples.x: He spotted a fisherman collecting roe from a freshly caught salmon.
The chef sprinkled a generous amount of roe on the dish.
We decided to try a new recipe and made sushi rolls with roe.

senses.definition: the flesh of a young cod

examples.x: We were on a fishing trip, hoping to catch some scrod for a fresh and satisfying seafood feast.

senses.definition: any sea creature that is eaten as food such as fish, shrimp, seaweed, and shellfish

examples.x: She's a seafood aficionado, specializing in preparing sushi and sashimi at home.
He enjoys dining on fresh seafood at the beachside restaurant, choosing from a variety of fish and shellfish.
He's on a seafood diet, preferring to eat only seafood dishes for their health benefits and delicious flavors.
The coastal town is known for its abundance of fresh seafood, attracting food enthusiasts from far and wide.
They enjoyed a seafood feast on the beach, with platters of shrimp, oysters, and grilled fish.

senses.definition: the internal organs of an animal such as the liver and kidneys, used as food

examples.x: As you stepped into the bustling market, the aroma of sizzling variety meats filled the air.
He decided to try a traditional dish that featured a mix of variety meats, including liver, heart, and tripe.

senses.definition: thin slices of cooked meat that are eaten cold

examples.x: As you strolled through the food market, the vendor enticed you with samples of various cold cuts.
I enjoyed a light and refreshing salad for lunch, topping a bed of fresh greens with slices of cold cuts.

senses.definition: salted meat, especially a duck, that is cooked at a low temperature stored in its own fat

examples.x: I started with a plate of confit pork belly, enjoying the lusciously tender and flavorful meat that had been slow-cooked in its own fat.
We explored the regional cuisine, discovering a traditional dish of confit rabbit.

senses.definition: the meat of a crab that can be eaten

examples.x: She prepared a delightful crab salad, combining chunks of sweet crab meat with crisp vegetables.
The seafood buffet offered a selection of crab dishes, from crab legs to crab salad.
He enjoyed a platter of chilled crab, served with cocktail sauce and lemon wedges.
He cooked a simple pasta dish with fresh crab, tossed in a garlic and herb butter sauce.
She savored the delicate flavor of crab, enjoying its sweet and tender meat.

senses.definition: meat of a young duck, eaten as food
meat of a bird, eaten as food

examples.x: He was eagerly tracking down wild fowl such as ducks and geese, aiming to bring home a prized bird for a delicious roast dinner.
The farmer proudly displayed a plump fowl at the market, inviting customers to savor its flavorful meat.

senses.definition: meat of a guinea fowl, eaten as food

examples.x: They hosted a celebratory dinner and served a magnificent roasted guinea fowl.
We decided to try a new recipe and cooked a delicious guinea fowl stew.

senses.definition: a type of fish called herring which is salted and then smoked

examples.x: I prepared a simple yet delicious dinner by pan-frying kippers with a squeeze of lemon juice.
The traditional English breakfast included a generous portion of kippers, served alongside eggs and bacon.

senses.definition: the edible meat obtained from horses

examples.x: He traveled to a foreign country where horseflesh was considered a delicacy.
He was unaware that eating horseflesh was illegal in their country.

senses.definition: the meat of the medium-sized game bird, known for its tender texture and rich, gamey flavor

examples.x: She decided to impress her dinner guests with a gourmet meal and served a beautifully roasted partridge.
The cookbook featured a mouthwatering recipe for partridge soup.

senses.definition: the tender meat of young bird, typically chickens, that are suitable for frying or cooking

examples.x: They grilled marinated fryer chicken skewers at the backyard barbecue.
We tried golden and crispy fryer chicken nuggets as a tasty snack.

senses.definition: having been cleaned, gutted, and prepared for cooking or sale, specifically referring to fish, poultry, or other meat

examples.x: Eating a dressed crab salad made my day.
The waiter recommended trying the dressed oysters.
She purchased dressed fish for her recipe to save time.

senses.definition: the meat of a large fish named tuna that lives in warm waters

examples.x: She made a tuna sandwich for lunch.
The chef served fresh tuna steaks with a side of vegetables.
The grilled tuna was seasoned with lemon and herbs.
She added chunks of tuna to her green salad.
The restaurant’s special was a seared tuna fillet.

senses.definition: the edible meat of the bivalve mollusk, known for its delicate texture and distinctive oceanic taste

examples.x: They visited a seaside restaurant famous for its clam dishes.

senses.definition: the edible internal organs of poultry, typically including the liver, heart, gizzard, and neck

examples.x: He and she discovered a family recipe that called for giblets in the meatball mixture.
You can surprise your guests with a unique appetizer of crispy fried chicken giblets.

senses.definition: the fatty tail end of a roast chicken or turkey
a chicken or game bird that has been split and flattened for cooking

examples.x: They enjoyed a grilled spatchcock guinea fowl, seasoned with aromatic spices and herbs.

senses.definition: a gastropod of warm seas that is edible and contains mother-of-pearl

examples.x: Harvesting abalone for culinary purposes requires sustainable practices to ensure the long-term survival of it.

senses.definition: a type of shellfish that can be eaten both raw and cooked, some of which contain pearls inside

examples.x: Bake oysters topped with a mixture of breadcrumbs, butter, and herbs for a delightful and easy-to-make appetizer.
He harvested wild oysters from the rocky shoreline, using a shucking knife to pry open the shells and reveal the succulent meat inside.
She ordered a dozen raw oysters as an appetizer, served with mignonette sauce and freshly grated horseradish.
She found a beautiful pearl inside the oyster she was eating at the beach.
